verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the Sinhala script as the definitive marker for Sri Lanka. The synthesis was clear, explicitly listing the corroborating evidence from all five agents (LHT, vegetation, utility poles, etc.) and correctly concluding that the prediction was Sri Lanka.
